_about: Per-job answers for an XPeng (xpengmotors) Greenhouse posting. Pass via `job-pro xpeng apply <postId> --form-file examples/forms/greenhouse-xpeng.json`. The CLI merges these into profile.custom for this one call without touching ~/.jobpro/profile.json. Keys correspond to the `name` field of each question in the schema (run --print-form to see them).
question_36528770002: Looking forward to contributing to XPeng's autonomous-driving stack.
